objective: Preflight a public crypto multi-exchange labeled dataset for missing MainRegimeV2 source-label slots.

schema_evidence.readme_label_definition: +1 if future price increase > +1%, 0 if neutral within +/-1%, -1 if future price decrease < -1%

mainregimev2_assessment.coverage_relevance: Touches crypto, Kraken, 15m, 1h, and 1d cells, but labels are future-return/technical-signal labels rather than independent Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis regime labels.
mainregimev2_assessment.blocker: Label fields are generated from future price moves and technical signals. Mapping +1/0/-1 to Bull/Sideways/Bear would be an OHLCV/future-return proxy, not an independent MainRegimeV2 source label. Crisis is absent, and Manipulation direct-event/order-flow/order-lifecycle evidence is absent.
